info.title: Aimtell API
info.description: Aimtell is a web push notification platform that enables sending push notifications to website visitors. The API provides endpoints for managing sites, subscribers, segments, push campaigns, event campaigns, RSS notifications, prompts, pixels, and more.

alias.description: A subscriber alias (usually a username, userid or email)

customIcon.description: url of custom icon to use (recommended size: 250x250)

customImage.description: url of custom image to use (recommended size: 300x500)

push_ttl.description: Time till a push should expire in seconds. Default is 1 week.

auto_hide.description: Number of seconds (255 max) until the notification will hide automatically. Default is 0, which is persistent (requires interaction)

collapse_key.description: replace visible notifications on a subscribers device (e.g. breaking_news)

value.name: Sample Triggered Notification # 2: Item Shipped
value.title: Your order has been shipped!
value.body: All items from order have now been shipped.  Click to view tracking information.

delay.description: Time in seconds after event when push should be sent

drip.description: Comma separated integer values representing delays as seconds from event. Example: 60, 300, 3600

customIcon.description: url of custom icon to use (recommended size: 250x250)

customImage.description: url of custom image to use (recommended size: 300x500))

target_device.description: device type to target (optional). can be either: "any", "mobile" or "desktop"

collapse_key.description: replace visible notifications on a subscribers device (e.g. breaking_news)

delete.description: Delete a specific Event Triggered Campaign

get.description:
Fetches Event Campaign Results (by Day)
Revenue for Monetized Campaigns is Included in Results

customIcon.description: url of custom icon to use (recommended size: 250x250)

customImage.description: url of custom image to use (recommended size: 300x500))

segments.description: Segments — comma separated list with no spaces e.g. 12345,12346,12347

max_enabled.description: enable maximum number of sends — set 0 for false,  1 for true

max_value.description: maximum number of sends e.g. 5 or 20

collapse_key.description: replace visible notifications on a subscribers device (e.g. breaking_news)

get.description: Enables you to fetch all MANUAL campaigns

value.name: Sample Campaign #1
value.title: Welcome to Aimtell!
value.body: Got questions? Check out our knowledge base.

put.description:
Updates a Specific Campaign

NOTE: When updating a campaign with A/B testing enabled,  the version_b status param (1 or 2) must be included to ensure that parameters shared by A and B  versions are updated in both campaigns (schedule_date, segments, automation, automation_end, push_ttl, auto_hide, tz_delivery, status). When updating the status of a campaign with A/B testing enabled, both the status param and the version_b status param must be set.

automation.description: Automation (d = daily, w = weekly, m = monthly, n = none)

collapse_key.description: replace visible notifications on a subscribers device replace visible notifications on a subscribers device (e.g. breaking_news)

tz_delivery.description: deliver based on user's timezone (set 0 for false, 1 for true)

customIcon.description: url of custom icon to use (recommended size: 250x250)

customImage.description: url of custom image to use (recommended size: 300x500)

version_b.description: (optional) Version B for A/B test campaign

status.description: set 1 for draft, 2 for scheduled (must match version a)

customIcon.description: (version b)  string url of custom icon to use (recommended size: 250x250)

customImage.description: (version b) url of custom image to use (recommended size: 300x500)

get.description: Returns Aimtell push & website tracking code.

value.value: <!-- start aimtell tracking code --> <script type='text/javascript'>var _at = {};_at.domain = 'demo.aimtell.com';_at.owner = '76cedd11b19e';_at.idSite = '179';_at.attributes = {};  (function() {var u='//api.aimtell.com/prod/';var d=document, g=d.createElement('script'), s=d.getElementsByTagName('script')[0];g.type='text/javascript'; g.async=true; g.defer=true; g.src=u+'trackpush.min.js'; s.parentNode.insertBefore(g,s);})();</script><!-- end aimtell tracking code -->

collect_ip.description: Allow collection of IP Address (0 = false, 1 = true)

collect_ip_as_attribute.description: Automatically track IP address as a custom attribute  (0 = false, 1 = true)

collect_suburl.description: Automatically track subscription URL as custom attribute  (0 = false, 1 = true)

collect_ua_as_attribute.description: Automatically track User Agent as custom attribute  (0 = false, 1 = true)

track_clicks_as_events.description: Automatically track notification clicks as custom events.  (0 = false, 1 = true)

track_subscribe_as_event.description: Automatically track subscriptions as custom events.  (0 = false, 1 = true)

retention_length.description: Number of days to keep data for deleted subscribers

frequency_cap.description: Max number of notifications a subscriber can receive per day

get.description:
Gets a Website's VAPID or FCM Keys

Keys that are marked "is_primary" are the ones that will be currently used on the site for new subscribers.

If the results are empty, this means you are using legacy Aimtell keys. We advise you to generate your own VAPID keys within the dashboard.

post.description:
Update a Website's VAPID or FCM Keys

Note: this can directly impact your optin rate and/or push delivery. Only update these if you know what you are doing.

pub.description: Public ID (either VAPID ID or FCM ID)

priv.description: Private key attached to the public id

type.description: top left drop down prompt = 1 , middle rectangle prompt = 3

get.description: Fetches all opt-in prompt conditions for a website
Fetches opt-in prompt condition by ID

put.description:
Updates opt-in prompt condition by ID

Note: If autoPrompt is set to true, seconds_delay, scroll_delay, and pages_delay should be set to NULL. If autoPrompt is set to false, provide a value for only one of the delay options, setting the other two to NULL (e.g. seconds_delay = 5, scroll_delay = NULL, pages_delay = NULL) 

If values are set for multiple delay options, they will be evaluated in the following order: autoPrompt, scroll_delay, seconds_delay, pages_delay.

When updating the default prompt condition, priority should be set to 0 and page should be set to *

browser.description: Browser (any, chrome, firefox, edge, opera, safari)

delete.description: Deletes opt-in prompt condition by ID

post.description:
Creates opt-in prompt condition

Note: If autoPrompt is set to true, seconds_delay, scroll_delay, and pages_delay should be set to NULL. If autoPrompt is set to false, provide a value for only one of the delay options, setting the other two to NULL (e.g. seconds_delay = 5, scroll_delay = NULL, pages_delay = NULL)

If values are set for multiple delay options, they will be evaluated in the following order: autoPrompt, scroll_delay, seconds_delay, pages_delay.

browser.description: Browser (any, chrome, firefox, edge, opera, safari)
